notes: v1.14.87 - Redesign Step 2 cont. (re-home Reference -> Hardware, part 1 = pg-power): the rest of pg-power (Power / LED-GPU / Rack Map / Blast Radius / Thermal subtabs + panels, after the Runbook split that went to Know) is re-parented into Reference->Hardware (#rf-hw) at boot (redesign_homeHardware), the orphaned Runbook stab is hidden, and initSubtab defaults the Power subtab. Fixed a latent bug: pw-rb (now in Know) was still a pwr-sub member, so Hardware subtab switching would have stripped its stab-active and hidden the Know panel - homeKnow now drops pw-rb from the pwr-sub group in redesign mode. Search repointed: 10 POWER/HW hits -> rf-hw, plus the missed 'Incident note template' runbook hit -> rf-know (Step 2 had only caught 3 of 4 runbook entries). The fiber strip's Hardware cross-link now routes to Reference->Hardware in redesign mode. Flag-gated; field mode leaves pg-power whole. STILL TODO: fold the Cage Nut Compass (pg-compass) in as a Hardware tool (next commit).
